_doc: Fixture REAL del incidente 2026-05-20: Anthropic CLI claude-code emitió un evento stream-json con shape estructural type=result, is_error=true, error_type=usage_limit_error. Es el caso ideal para el detector: shape canónico, no requiere regex.
raw: {"type":"result","is_error":true,"error_type":"usage_limit_error","error":"You have reached your weekly usage limit. Resets at 2026-05-27T00:00:00Z.","session_id":"sess_abc123"}
